name: Content generation
indicators: Generative model in the serving path; output rendered to users

name: Data access — internal
definition: Reads organizational or user data (files, CRM, tickets, telemetry)
indicators: Data-store connectors, retrieval pipelines, scoped credentials

name: Data access — personal/sensitive
definition: Processes personal data or special categories (health, minors, biometrics)

name: Tool invocation — read-only
definition: Calls tools/APIs that observe but do not change state
indicators: Tool registry entries with read scopes

name: Tool invocation — state-changing
definition: Executes actions that modify systems (write DB, change configs, issue refunds, quarantine hosts)

name: External communication
definition: Sends messages to parties outside the operator (emails, chats, posts, tickets to third parties)

name: Autonomous multi-step planning
definition: Decomposes goals and sequences actions without per-step human approval
indicators: Planner/orchestrator loop; step budget > 1 without HITL gate

name: Consequential decision-making
definition: Makes or materially influences decisions with legal or similarly significant effects on persons
indicators: Decision output consumed without independent human judgment

name: Memory & profiling
definition: Persists information about users/entities across sessions to shape future behavior
indicators: Long-term memory stores keyed to identity

name: Delegation / multi-agent orchestration
definition: Spawns or tasks other agents; accepts tasks from other agents

name: Self-modification of scope
definition: Acquires new tools, permissions, or data sources at runtime

name: Financial/transactional execution
definition: Moves money or commits the operator contractually
